metadata.author: Agent 8 - Integration Pipeline Builder
metadata.description: Unified registry of all 120 interpretable musical parameters discovered through modular semantic encoding

harmony.description: Harmonic structure, chord progressions, and voice leading

parameters.name: harmonic_complexity
parameters.description: Overall complexity of harmonic progression (simple → complex)
parameters.interpretation: Low: diatonic, simple chords. High: chromaticism, extended chords

parameters.name: voice_leading_smoothness
parameters.description: How smooth voice movements are between chords
parameters.interpretation: Low: large leaps. High: stepwise motion

parameters.name: chord_density
parameters.interpretation: Low: triads. High: 7ths, 9ths, clusters

parameters.name: harmonic_rhythm
parameters.interpretation: Low: slow changes. High: rapid chord progression

parameters.name: tonal_center_stability
parameters.description: How stable the tonal center is
parameters.interpretation: Low: modulating, ambiguous. High: firmly established key

parameters.name: dissonance_level
parameters.interpretation: Low: consonant intervals. High: tritones, seconds, clusters

parameters.name: chord_color_richness
parameters.description: Use of chord extensions and alterations
parameters.interpretation: Low: basic triads. High: 9ths, 11ths, 13ths, alterations

parameters.name: bass_motion_pattern
parameters.interpretation: Low: static/pedal. High: walking bass, active motion

parameters.name: secondary_dominants_frequency
parameters.description: Use of secondary dominants and tonicization
parameters.interpretation: Low: diatonic. High: frequent V/x chords

parameters.name: harmonic_tension_resolution
parameters.interpretation: Low: unresolved. High: clear tension-release patterns

harmony.note: Parameters 10-29 to be discovered during training

rhythm.description: Rhythmic patterns, groove, and temporal organization

parameters.name: syncopation_intensity
parameters.interpretation: Low: on-beat emphasis. High: off-beat accents, anticipation

parameters.name: groove_pocket_tightness
parameters.interpretation: Low: loose, laid-back. High: tight, precise timing

parameters.name: polyrhythmic_complexity
parameters.description: Use of multiple simultaneous rhythmic patterns
parameters.interpretation: Low: unison rhythms. High: 3 against 2, polymeter

parameters.name: swing_straight_continuum
parameters.interpretation: Low: straight 8ths. High: swung 8ths

parameters.name: rhythmic_density
parameters.description: Number of rhythmic events per measure
parameters.interpretation: Low: sparse, whole notes. High: dense, 16th notes

parameters.name: accent_pattern_regularity
parameters.description: Regularity vs irregularity of accent patterns
parameters.interpretation: Low: irregular, shifting accents. High: regular patterns

parameters.name: subdivision_preference
parameters.interpretation: Low: simple (quarters, 8ths). High: complex (16ths, triplets)

parameters.name: rhythmic_anticipation
parameters.interpretation: Low: notes on downbeats. High: frequent anticipations

rhythm.note: Parameters 38-49 to be discovered during training

form.description: Large-scale structure, section relationships, and form

parameters.name: tension_arc_shape
parameters.interpretation: Low: flat, even. High: dramatic arc, climax-oriented

parameters.name: section_contrast_degree
parameters.interpretation: Low: subtle variations. High: stark contrasts

parameters.name: climax_position_ratio
parameters.description: Position of main climax in piece (0=start, 1=end)
parameters.interpretation: Golden ratio ≈ 0.618 is common in classical music

parameters.name: repetition_variation_balance
parameters.interpretation: Low: mostly repetition. High: continuous variation

parameters.name: golden_ratio_tendency
parameters.interpretation: Low: arbitrary proportions. High: φ-based structure

parameters.name: intro_outro_symmetry
parameters.interpretation: Low: asymmetric. High: mirrored intro/outro

parameters.name: bridge_contrast_level
parameters.description: How contrasting the bridge section is
parameters.interpretation: Low: similar to verse/chorus. High: distinct character

form.note: Parameters 57-64 to be discovered during training

orchestration.description: Instrumentation, voice spacing, and timbral arrangement

parameters.name: instrumentation_density_curve
parameters.description: Evolution of instrument count over time
parameters.interpretation: Low: thin, solo → duo. High: full ensemble

parameters.name: vertical_spacing_preference
parameters.interpretation: Low: close voicing. High: wide, spread voicing

parameters.name: doubling_strategy
parameters.interpretation: Low: no doubling. High: extensive unison/octaves

parameters.name: timbral_balance_profile
parameters.interpretation: Low: homogeneous. High: diverse timbres

parameters.name: voice_crossing_frequency
parameters.interpretation: Low: strict ranges. High: frequent crossing

parameters.name: register_distribution
parameters.interpretation: Low: centered in mid. High: full spectrum

parameters.name: instrument_role_clarity
parameters.interpretation: Low: blurred roles. High: distinct functions

parameters.name: brass_string_balance
parameters.description: Balance between brass and strings (big band specific)
parameters.interpretation: Low: brass-heavy. High: string-heavy

orchestration.note: Parameters 73-89 to be discovered during training

texture.description: Musical texture, voice independence, and layering

parameters.name: homophonic_vs_polyphonic
parameters.interpretation: Low: homophonic, block chords. High: polyphonic, independent voices

parameters.name: voice_independence_score
parameters.description: Degree of melodic independence between voices
parameters.interpretation: Low: parallel motion. High: counterpoint

parameters.name: textural_density_evolution
parameters.interpretation: Low: static density. High: dynamic evolution

parameters.name: call_response_patterns
parameters.interpretation: Low: continuous texture. High: antiphonal, call-response

parameters.name: layer_interaction_complexity
parameters.description: Complexity of interaction between textural layers
parameters.interpretation: Low: simple layering. High: interweaving, complex relationships

parameters.name: rhythmic_unison_frequency
parameters.description: How often voices move in rhythmic unison
parameters.interpretation: Low: independent rhythms. High: synchronized rhythms

parameters.name: melodic_divergence
parameters.interpretation: Low: parallel melodies. High: divergent contours

texture.note: Parameters 97-109 to be discovered during training

cross_dimensional.description: Cross-dimensional parameter coupling and interaction patterns

parameters.name: harmonic_rhythmic_coupling
parameters.description: Correlation between harmonic and rhythmic complexity
parameters.interpretation: Low: independent. High: coupled (complex harmony → complex rhythm)

parameters.name: form_driven_texture_change
parameters.description: How much form drives textural changes
parameters.interpretation: Low: texture independent of form. High: sectional texture changes

parameters.name: structural_harmonic_anchoring
parameters.description: Use of harmony to articulate structure
parameters.interpretation: Low: fluid harmony. High: cadences mark sections

parameters.name: orchestral_intensity_gradient
parameters.description: Coordination of orchestration with overall intensity
parameters.interpretation: Low: static orchestration. High: builds with intensity

parameters.name: climax_convergence_factor
parameters.description: Degree to which all parameters converge at climax
parameters.interpretation: Low: distributed peaks. High: all dimensions peak together

cross_dimensional.note: Parameters 115-119 to be discovered during training
